title: HTML & CSS — Your First Web Page
description: Build a real web page from scratch. HTML is structure, CSS is style. Together they make everything you see on the web.

title: JavaScript in the Browser
description: Make your web page respond to users. Clicks, forms, dynamic content. This is where it gets fun.

title: Ship It — From Laptop to the Internet
description: Deploy your app. Buy a domain, set up hosting, go live. Your first URL that strangers can visit.
